pages.title: Internal Buffer
pages.text: Exporters have a $(bold)9-slot internal buffer$(): $(li)Exporter pulls items from adjacent machines into buffer $(li)PreFab extracts items from buffer $(li)Buffer allows for timing differences between machine output and PreFab extraction

pages.title: Active Pulling
pages.text: Exporters $(bold)actively pull$() from adjacent machines every tick: // Every tick: $(li)Check all 6 adjacent blocks $(li)If block has IItemHandler capability: $(li)Try to extract items (up to 64 per slot) $(li)Insert extracted items into Exporter's buffer$(br2)This means Exporters work with machines that do not push (like furnaces).

pages.title: Tick Behavior
pages.text: $(bold)Every game tick$() (20 times per second): $(li)Query all adjacent blocks for `IItemHandler` $(li)Extract items from those blocks $(li)Store in internal buffer $(li)PreFab extracts from buffer when ready
